title: Cost of Living & Jobs
summary: I will create 1 million new formal jobs and cap the retail price of maize flour and cooking gas by December 2029.

title: Business Support
summary: I will extend affordable, low-interest loans to 500,000 small businesses through the government business fund by 2030.

title: Farming & Food Security
summary: I will cut the cost of fertilizer and certified seed by 30% for 2 million registered farmers by the 2029 planting season.

title: Healthcare for All
summary: I will enroll 10 million more households in the national health insurance scheme and cap out-of-pocket hospital bills by 2031.

title: Schools & Colleges
summary: I will hire 20,000 new teachers and clear the university capitation funding backlog by 2029.

title: National Security
summary: I will recruit 10,000 additional police officers and complete security fencing on 3 priority border routes by 2030.

title: Foreign Affairs & Trade
summary: I will place 200,000 Kenyans in verified overseas jobs and open 5 new export markets for local goods by 2031.

title: Roads & Transport
summary: I will complete 5,000km of priority national highways and cap public transport fare increases by 2032.

title: Electricity & Water
summary: I will connect 3 million new households to the national grid and complete 2 major dam projects by 2032.

title: Technology & Internet
summary: I will extend fiber-optic internet coverage to 500 sub-counties by 2030.

title: Local Hospitals
summary: I will fully stock and staff every level 4 and 5 hospital in the county with essential medicine and equipment by 2029.

title: Village Roads
summary: I will grade and gravel 500km of rural access roads linking farms to market centers by 2030.

title: Clean Water Access
summary: I will pipe clean water to 100,000 additional households and rehabilitate the main town sewer lines by 2031.

title: Better Markets
summary: I will construct or renovate 20 modern market centers with roofing, water, and toilets by 2029.

title: Crop & Livestock Markets
summary: I will build 3 milk and produce cold-storage or processing facilities by 2030.

title: Youth & Women Funds
summary: I will disburse low-interest county grants to 10,000 youth and women groups by 2029.

title: Physical Planning
summary: I will issue digitized building permits within 14 days and clear drainage in every major town by 2028.

title: County Licenses
summary: I will cut the number of licenses required to open a retail shop from 5 to 2 by 2028.

title: School Fees Assistance
summary: I will issue NG-CDF bursaries to 5,000 needy secondary and tertiary students a year, published on a public ward list, starting 2028.

title: School Buildings
summary: I will construct 50 new classrooms and 5 science labs across the constituency by 2030.

title: Local Police Posts
summary: I will build 5 new police posts and 3 chiefs' offices by 2029.

title: Youth Talents & Sports
summary: I will level and equip 10 community sports grounds by 2029.

title: National Laws
summary: I will sponsor or co-sponsor 2 bills protecting citizens from unfair taxation or business rules by 2029.

title: Vulnerable Group Support
summary: I will register 2,000 widows, orphans, and persons with disabilities for direct state support by 2028.

title: School Fees Assistance
summary: I will issue NGAAF bursaries to 5,000 needy secondary and tertiary students a year, published on a public ward list, starting 2028.

title: School Buildings
summary: I will construct 50 new classrooms and 5 science labs across the county by 2030.

title: Local Police Posts
summary: I will build 5 new police posts and 3 chiefs' offices by 2029.

title: Youth Talents & Sports
summary: I will level and equip 10 community sports grounds by 2029.

title: National Laws
summary: I will sponsor or co-sponsor 2 bills protecting citizens from unfair taxation or business rules by 2029.

title: Vulnerable Group Support
summary: I will register 2,000 widows, orphans, and persons with disabilities for direct state support by 2028.

title: More Money to Counties
summary: I will push the equitable share of national revenue to counties above 35% by the 2029/30 budget cycle.

title: County Money Auditing
summary: I will publish a quarterly county spending scorecard flagging any budget variance over 5% starting 2028.

title: Protecting Devolved Services
summary: I will block every bill that transfers health or county-roads functions back to the national government, and report on it annually through 2032.

title: Resolving County Borders
summary: I will mediate and resolve 3 outstanding county boundary disputes by 2030.

title: Inter-County Trade
summary: I will pass legislation capping cross-county trade licenses to one by 2029.

title: Ward Bursaries
summary: I will secure bursary allocations for 1,000 ward students a year, published publicly, starting 2028.

title: Neighborhood Paths
summary: I will fix 20km of footpaths, footbridges, and trenches using the Ward Development Fund by 2029.

title: Street Lights
summary: I will install security lights at 15 shopping centers and bodaboda stages by 2029.

title: Bodaboda Sheds
summary: I will construct 10 shaded waiting bays for bodaboda riders and taxi operators by 2029.

title: Ward Representation
summary: I will table at least 4 ward resident petitions a year at the County Assembly floor, 20 cumulatively by 2032.

title: Community Volunteers
summary: I will fund stipends and kits for 50 Community Health Promoters by 2028.
